llm_response:
The team will commence the week with a strategic planning phase to define the scope of the new app feature. This initial phase sets the foundation for all subsequent development activities and ensures alignment on goals. A collaborative brainstorming session is scheduled for Monday morning to refine these objectives.

Monday through Friday will be dedicated to intensive coding, rigorous testing, and regular team synchronization. Developers must ensure every code change includes a thorough review before it is merged into the main branch. The project manager will facilitate a daily stand-up to track progress and address any immediate blockers. An update on the sprint velocity will be provided during the Friday afternoon review meeting. For further guidance on maintaining high standards, refer to [Agile Best Practices](https://agilemanifesto.org). The schedule below outlines the specific daily allocations for the entire week.

### Daily Development Workflow
*   Morning stand-up meeting
*   Core feature coding
*   Peer code review
*   Bug fixing and refinement

### Weekly Milestones and Reviews
*   Feature completion check
*   Integration testing phase
*   User acceptance testing
*   Final deployment preparation

### Team Communication Protocols
*   Daily status reports
*   Weekly progress review
*   Technical documentation updates
*   Post-mortem analysis

The team will conclude the week with a comprehensive review of the completed feature. All deliverables must be documented clearly to support future maintenance efforts. Adherence to this structured schedule is essential for delivering a high-quality product on time.
